26987.title: Mary Berry Cooks
26987.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

26988.title: Call the Midwife
26988.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

26989.title: Summer of Rockets
26989.description: During the tumultuous summer of 1958, Samuel prepares to launch his new invention, which is attracting some suspicious followers, before meeting the mysterious Kathleen.

26990.title: Father Brown
26990.description: Suspicions abound when, in a shocking turn of events, the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a woman.

26991.title: Call the Midwife
26991.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

26992.title: Summer of Rockets
26992.description: During the tumultuous summer of 1958, Samuel prepares to launch his new invention, which is attracting some suspicious followers, before meeting the mysterious Kathleen.

26993.title: Mary Berry Cooks
26993.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

26994.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26994.description: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies in a magic trick gone gruesomely wrong.

26995.title: Bargain Hunt
26995.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire with experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. Two mother-and-daughter teams battle it out, each buying three items to hopefully make a profit at auction.

26996.title: Bad Move
26996.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

26997.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26997.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.

26998.title: Doctors
26998.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

26999.title: EastEnders
26999.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

27000.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27000.description: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies in a magic trick gone gruesomely wrong.

27001.title: Bargain Hunt
27001.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire with experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. Two mother-and-daughter teams battle it out, each buying three items to hopefully make a profit at auction.

27002.title: Impossible
27002.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27003.title: Antiques Roadshow
27003.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

27004.title: Bad Move
27004.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

27005.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27005.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.

27006.title: Bargain Hunt
27006.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.

27007.title: Doctors
27007.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

27008.title: EastEnders
27008.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

27009.title: Impossible
27009.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27010.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27010.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

27011.title: Antiques Roadshow
27011.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

27012.title: Bad Move
27012.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

27013.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27013.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

27014.title: Doctors
27014.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

27015.title: EastEnders
27015.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

27016.title: Impossible
27016.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27017.title: Mary Berry Cooks
27017.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

27018.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
27018.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

27019.title: Doctors
27019.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

27020.title: EastEnders
27020.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

27021.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27021.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

27022.title: Silent Witness
27022.description: The accidental fatal shooting of a Polish teenager in an armed police operation triggers a series of murders that link Turkish gangsters, a grieving family and a fractured firearms unit.
